## Summary

Describe what happened and what you expected.

## Environment

## Diagnostics

Attach sanitized Home Assistant diagnostics for the integration.

## Logs

Paste only sanitized debug log lines from `custom_components.istore_solar`.

## Privacy checklist

- [ ] I removed access tokens and refresh tokens.
- [ ] I removed Authorization headers and cookies.
- [ ] I removed email/account details.
- [ ] I removed site names, addresses, IDs, NMI values, and serial numbers.
- [ ] I did not attach raw HAR files or raw API payloads.
